meaning: n.(集市上的)蓬摊,(剧场等的)包厢,池座
examples: But now I want to set your group as figured in the group list, but here is a situation: I cannot see your group loge, so can you upload one?
The upper loge, arching toward the rear ceiling like some kind of ski ramp, is so steep that you need a bungee jumper's nerve to sit there.
